description: city and county seat of Grady County, Oklahoma, United States
description_wiki: Chickasha ( CHIK-ə-shay) is a city in and the county seat of Grady County, Oklahoma, United States.

description: city and state capital of Oklahoma, United States
description_wiki: Oklahoma City (  OH-klə-HOH-mə -⁠), often shortened to OKC, is the capital and most populous city in the U.S. state of Oklahoma.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Texas (  TEK-səss) is the most populous state in the Southern United States.

description: unorganized territory of the United States
description_wiki: Indian Territory and the Indian Territories are terms that generally described an evolving land area set aside by the United States government for the relocation of Native Americans who held original Indian title to their land as an independent nation.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: North Carolina (  KAYR-ə-LIE-nə) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic regions of the United States.
